name: PetHub Gallery Catalog
description: Optional cache for the PetHub gallery. The homepage prefers real manifests from pets/<pet-id>/pet.json and uses this file as a fallback.

pets.description: A cyberpunk fox hacker pet with neon techwear, bright ears, and a tiny wrist deck.
A cozy coder cat pet in an oversized navy hoodie, quietly working with a tiny laptop.
